sections.paragraph:
verb לכלות (>>לִכְלוֹת)

to run out, end

verb כולה

be finished, completed, ended

verb להתכלות

be destroyed, consumed

verb להכיל

to contain, hold, include, comprise; endure

verb הוכל

be contained, included, comprised

verb לכלות (>>כילה)

to finish, complete, end; destroy, consume

preposition

all, every, each, any, everything, whole, entire, all of, pan-, omni-, ilk
